credentials.telegramChatId: Enter your Telegram Chat ID for notifications (optional)
credentials.signalUrl: Enter Signal URL for webhook integration (optional)
credentials.connectBtn: Click to connect to FlatTrade trading server

search.searchInput: Type symbol name to search (e.g., RELIANCE, NIFTY)
search.exchangeNFO: Select NFO exchange for F&O contracts
search.exchangeCDS: Select CDS exchange for currency derivatives

watchlist.symbolRow: Click to view chart and details

algoTrading.direction: Select trade direction - BUY or SELL
algoTrading.quantity: Enter quantity/lot size for the order
algoTrading.targetType_percent: Target calculated as percentage from entry
algoTrading.slInput: Enter stop loss value or percentage
algoTrading.slType_percent: Stop loss calculated as percentage from entry
algoTrading.slType_value: Stop loss as absolute price value
algoTrading.trailingSL: Enable trailing stop loss - SL moves with favorable price
algoTrading.repeatCount: Number of times to re-trigger on SL hit. 0 = No repeat
algoTrading.requireTvCondition: Require TradingView condition to be met
algoTrading.requireSignalCondition: Require signal condition to be met
algoTrading.modifySL: New stop loss value for modification
algoTrading.exitPositionBtn: Exit position immediately at market price

_instructions.howToEdit: Simply edit the tooltip text above. Changes take effect on page reload.
_instructions.howToTest: Open browser console (F12) and type: debugTooltips() to see all tooltips
_instructions.howToRefresh: Type refreshTooltips() in console to reload without page refresh
_instructions.howToForce: Type forceApplyTooltips() in console if tooltips are not showing
_instructions.note: If values are not showing in tooltips, check browser console for errors
